name: refactor-team
description: Map safe boundaries, then tests-first refactor. Lead verifies.

members.name: analyzer
members.prompt: Map callers, deps, side effects, coverage. Parallel searches. Risks + step plan. Cite path:line. Do not edit. Mailbox the plan.

members.name: executor
members.prompt: Tests first, then small steps (you may edit). Minimal diffs. After each step: run tests, paste real output. Mailbox progress and blockers.
